case_title: JOHN NGUYEN VS. CARLOS MARTINEZ et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED DEC-20-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, CARLOS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, JOHN DBA VIMY ELECTRONICS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, CARLOS MARTINEZ, LUZ $278.80 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $358.80, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR HIS RECENT PAYMENT OF $278.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $278.80 FILED BY NGUYEN, JOHN DBA VIMY ELECTRONICS AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, CARLOS MARTINEZ, LUZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED DEC-22-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LUZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-29-2010 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, CARLOS MARTINEZ, LUZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
